name: 8D remediation (approved 2026-04-28)
what_it_solves: Structured 8-Discipline remediation applied to a batch of prior findings.
how_it_solves: Immediate downgrades applied to: filing status, 4-published-trials, LATIFY preliminary label, LATIFY delta quarantine, NCT02264678 split, Claim 16 split, CT-06 §2.4 addendum, script reproducibility (permanent downgrade). Formula-dependent items (CT-01, CT-02, DL-03, DL-07, PC-05) were quarantined until PATH A vs PATH B was resolved.
why_it_exists: Turns a batch of audit findings into a single tracked remediation with a shared timestamp and shared status field.

attributes.pc_02_status: permanently downgraded until retroactive_prediction_run.py --trial-vectors reproduces documented deltas cleanly
